settings.simple_mode_desc: Hides advanced engine parameters. Ideal for beginners.
settings.theme_experimental_desc: 0 keeps the original palette. 100 pushes the full interface toward the experimental tint for the active light or dark theme.
settings.auto_ui_scale_desc: Detects your display DPI at startup and applies the correct scale automatically.
settings.platform.desktop: Windows, macOS, Linux. Full rendering capabilities.
settings.platform.mobile: Android/iOS. Adaptive layout, touch input optimizations.
settings.platform.web: WebAssembly. Runs securely in any modern browser.
settings.platform.cloud: Cloud streaming mode. Compatible with external clients.
settings.platform.console: Consoles. Requires explicit manufacturer SDK integration.
settings.command_console_enabled_desc: Unlocks slash commands in the Console. Saving this setting also updates the active project's command switch.
settings.shortcuts_experimental_desc: Current shortcuts are still mostly fixed while the editor is being stabilized. Remapping will land later and may change behavior.
app.shortcut_undo_redo_context: Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y  -  Undo / Redo in the active editor context
app.shortcut_customization_experimental: Shortcut customization is available in Settings as an experimental upcoming area.
app.export_log_notice: For now, exported content is written to the log.
app.could_not_connect_make_sure_openclaw:
Could not connect. Make sure OpenClaw is running \
                                 (openclaw gateway start)
app.this_provider_is_not_implemented_yet: This provider is not implemented yet. Use OpenClaw.
settings.render_execution_policy_desc: Chooses how the engine prefers to render on this machine. Project GPU toggles only unlock advanced features.
ai.tool.create_entity.desc: Create a new entity in the scene
ai.tool.set_property.desc: Set a property on an entity
ai.tool.import_asset.desc: Import an asset file into the project
ai.tool.place_component.desc: Place an electronic component on the schematic
ai.tool.run_electrical_test.desc: Run electrical connectivity test on the schematic
ai.tool.add_wire.desc: Connect two points on the schematic with a wire
ai.tool.remove_component.desc: Remove an electronic component by its designator
ai.tool.set_component_value.desc: Change the value of an electronic component
ai.tool.rotate_component.desc: Rotate an electronic component by 90 degrees
ai.tool.run_simulation.desc: Run DC simulation on the current schematic
ai.tool.get_simulation_results.desc: Get the results of the last DC simulation
ai.tool.run_drc.desc: Run Design Rule Check on the schematic
ai.tool.export_schematic.desc: Export schematic in the specified format
ai.tool.generate_bom.desc: Generate Bill of Materials in CSV format
ai.tool.get_netlist.desc: Generate and return the netlist of the current schematic
app.name: Name:
app.no_assets: No assets found. Import files to get started.
app.hub_subtitle: Create, reopen, and organize active AuraRafi projects from one launcher.
app.hub_create_subtitle: Start a fresh scene or electronics workspace without leaving the launcher.
app.hub_new_game_desc: Start a blank 3D project focused on world building, scripting, and scene editing.
app.hub_new_electronics_desc: Open a schematic and PCB workflow with simulation-ready structure from the start.
app.hub_search_hint: Search by project name or path
app.hub_empty_subtitle: Create a new project to get started.
app.hub_no_search_results: No projects match the current search or filter.
app.unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes in the current project.
app.pcb_canvas_hint_hover_component: Drag the highlighted component to move it.
app.pcb_route_hint_hover: Click the highlighted airwire to route it.
app.pcb_canvas_hint: Left click selects and drag moves components. Middle or right drag pans. Wheel zooms.
app.pcb_route_hint: Click an airwire to create a routed orthogonal trace on the board.
app.pcb_outline_hint: Click to place board points. Click the first point again to close the outline. Right click cancels the draft.
app.pcb_route_selected_hint: Use the toolbar or Route tool to convert this airwire into a copper trace.
app.pcb_duplicate_disabled: Duplicate is disabled in PCB mode. Duplicate parts from the schematic source.
app.schematic_root_summary: Global summary of the active schematic.
app.schematic_canvas_hint: Left click selects. Middle or right drag pans. Wheel zooms.
app.schematic_canvas_hint_wire: Click to chain wires. Right click cancels the current route. Esc exits wire mode.
app.electronics_multi_select_hint: Shift adds to selection. Ctrl removes from selection.
app.drag_drop_hint: Drag and drop files here to import them.
app.ide_dialog_message: To edit scripts, use an external IDE. Choose one:
app.script_external_hint: Scripts are edited in an external IDE. Attach, inspect, and validate them here.
app.script_registry_empty: No scripts found in assets/scripts. Create one from Assets or add files externally.
app.enable_console_commands_desc: Allows this project to accept slash commands from the Console. This switch is linked with Settings, and file commands stay inside this project folder.
app.allow_gpu_features_desc: Enables heavier project-only GPU features such as richer materials, post effects, or future advanced pipelines. It does not choose the base backend.
app.depth_accurate_desc: Fixes overlap and piercing artifacts with a CPU depth pass. More correct, but slower when enabled.
app.project_save_mode_standard_desc: Keep manual save plus timed auto-save. Best when you want fewer disk writes during long edits.
app.project_save_mode_linear_desc: Save immediately after each committed edit. Useful when you want the project state written to disk almost instantly.
app.runtime_temporarily_disabled: Game runtime is temporarily disconnected while the renderer is being rebuilt.
app.runtime_scene_locked: Runtime is active. Stop play mode to edit the scene document.
console.input_hint: Send a message or type / for commands
console.commands_disabled: Console commands are disabled for this editor or project.
console.commands_enable_hint: Enable them in Settings and Project Settings.
console.tab_hint: Tab autocompletes command names. Enter sends.
commands.help.desc: Shows command syntax and the most relevant commands for the active domain.
commands.commands.desc: Lists commands from one domain or every domain.
commands.describe.desc: Shows the command contract, parameters, aliases and examples.
commands.undo.desc: Reverts the latest document change recorded by the editor.
commands.redo.desc: Restores the latest reverted document change.
commands.project_info.desc: Prints active project metadata and command enablement.
commands.workspace_read.desc: Reads a text file inside the active project folder.
commands.workspace_search.desc: Searches text files inside the active project folder.
commands.game_add.desc: Creates a scene primitive and selects it.
commands.game_select.desc: Selects a scene node by id or name.
commands.game_rename.desc: Renames the selected or targeted scene node.
commands.game_delete.desc: Deletes the selected or targeted scene node.
commands.game_duplicate.desc: Duplicates a scene node and offsets the copy.
commands.game_set_transform.desc: Sets position, rotation and scale fields on a scene node.
commands.game_move.desc: Moves a scene node by a delta.
commands.game_rotate.desc: Rotates a scene node by Euler degree deltas.
commands.game_scale.desc: Scales a scene node uniformly or per axis.
commands.game_color.desc: Changes the primitive color of a scene node.
commands.game_arrange_grid.desc: Arranges root scene nodes into a preview grid.
commands.game_generate_prefab.desc: Generates a small scene prefab from existing primitives.
commands.game_describe_scene.desc: Summarizes scene nodes, transforms, meshes and bounds.
commands.game_focus.desc: Focuses the viewport on a selected or targeted scene node.
commands.electronics_add_part.desc: Places a schematic component from the electronics library.
commands.electronics_wire.desc: Adds a schematic wire between two points.
commands.electronics_autolayout.desc: Places schematic components in an ordered grid.
commands.electronics_simulate.desc: Runs the available schematic simulation pass.
commands.electronics_bom.desc: Exports a bill of materials summary.
commands.electronics_describe.desc: Summarizes the schematic components, wires and nets.
commands.pcb_sync.desc: Synchronizes PCB components from the schematic.
commands.pcb_route_airwire.desc: Routes one PCB airwire as a trace.
commands.pcb_describe.desc: Summarizes PCB board, components, traces and airwires.
commands.param.name: Optional name.
schematic_hint_select: Click to select, drag to move, double-click to rename
schematic_hint_select_active: Selection active. Right-click for options, drag to move
schematic_hint_place: Click on the grid to place the component. Press R to rotate
schematic_hint_paste: Click to paste components from clipboard
schematic_hint_wire: Click on a pin to start wiring. Right-click to cancel
pcb_hint_select: Click to select components, traces or airwires. Drag to move
pcb_hint_route: Click an airwire to start routing. Click to place trace corners
pcb_hint_outline: Click to add outline vertices. Close the shape to finish
app.electronics_net_name_prompt: Enter net name (applies to all connected wires):
settings.script_runtime_enabled_desc: Master switch. Off until the runtime is fully built. See docs/SCRIPTING_SYSTEM.md
commands.script_create.desc: Creates a new script file from a template.
commands.script_attach.desc: Attaches a script file to a scene entity.
commands.script_detach.desc: Removes a script from a scene entity.
commands.script_list.desc: Lists all scripts in the project scripts folder.
commands.script_validate.desc: Checks a script for syntax errors.
commands.script_run.desc: Executes a script on_start once in the editor.
commands.script_compile_nodes.desc: Compiles a node graph flow to Rhai source.
